name: Watchtower
shortDescription: Track current holders, take daily snapshots. Use in conditions, shipment, Discord roles, and airdrops.
longDescription: Watchtower lets you enable per-mint tracking: Current holders (short refresh rate for conditions, shipment, Discord), Snapshot (daily holder snapshots), and Transactions (coming soon). Each track is independently billable.
detailedDescription: Enable Current holders track for per-mint holder data at short refresh rate. Usable in conditions, shipment, and Discord roles. Snapshot track for daily holder snapshots. Transactions track is coming soon. Pricing: 5 USDC/month per mint for Current holders, 5 USDC/month per mint for Snapshot, 20 USDC/month per mint for Transactions.
keyInfo: Per-mint track toggles (Current holders, Snapshot, Transactions)
Member page to view holder snapshots and results

activationInstructions.intro: Enable tracking for mints in your address book.
steps: Add mints in Admin > Address Book
Enable Current holders, Snapshot, or Transactions per mint in Watchtower
activationInstructions.note: Current holders track powers conditions, shipment, and Discord roles. Enable it for mints used in those features.
